# Keeelai

Keeelai is an interactive learning platform that helps teachers explain complex concepts and enables children to run hands-on virtual experiments using an immersive simulation player.

## Visual Simulation Lab
Our browser-based interactive simulation player brings abstract math and science concepts to life.

### Key Capabilities
- **Tactile Learning**: Students manipulate variables (e.g. temperature, gear sizing, titrants) and see real-time graphical reactions.
- **Active Concept Checks**: Interactive check-your-understanding checkpoints built directly into lessons.
- **Smartboard & iPad Optimized**: Clean interface controls scaled for classroom projections and tablet studies.
- **K-12 Alignment**: Structured around science and math school curriculums.

## Key Links
- Homepage: https://keeelai.com/
- Demos: https://keeelai.com/demo
- Pricing & Membership: https://keeelai.com/checkout
